ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation
ham.body:
Namaste [Passenger Name],

Aapke flight ki itinerary confirmed ho chuki hai. Below are the details:

- Flight: AI 123 (Air India)
- Departure: 15-Oct-2026, 10:30 AM from Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL)
- Arrival: 15-Oct-2026, 12:00 PM at Kempegowda International Airport (BLR)
- Seat: 12A, Window
- Check‑in: 2 hours before departure at counter 5 or online via <URL>

Please bring a valid ID proof and carry‑on baggage within 7 kg. For any changes, contact our support at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing Air India. Safe travels!

Best regards,
Air India Customer Service

spam.subject: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

This is an important notification from Microsoft 365 Support. Your Microsoft 365 password is set to expire in 3 days on 30-September-2026. To ensure uninterrupted access to your email, documents, and services, you must update your password immediately. Please click on the secure link below and follow the instructions:

<URL>

If you do not update your password within the expiry window, your account will be automatically locked and you will lose access to your data. For any assistance, contact Microsoft Support at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Microsoft 365 Support Team
